channel.title: What's New in China
channel.description: Field dispatches from the ground in China.

item.title: Pillow with built in Bluetooth speaker
item.description: Pillow with built in Bluetooth speaker

item.title: Phone case with a checkered pattern and a built-in secondary display showing time and a c…
item.description: Phone case with a checkered pattern and a built-in secondary display showing time and a custom capybara image. This turns the rear camera bump into a small always-on screen, separate from the main display. Spotted at a phone accessory stall stacked with dozens of other case designs.

item.title: Bone conduction headphones and mini bluetooth speakers stacked in a glass display case at…
item.description: Bone conduction headphones and mini bluetooth speakers stacked in a glass display case at a retail counter. Product cards with model photos sit underneath as backing. Simple, functional merchandising for small electronics accessories.

item.title: Wireless earbuds cases in metallic pastel colors, each embellished with crystal flower an…
item.description: Wireless earbuds cases in metallic pastel colors, each embellished with crystal flower and bow charms on the buds themselves. Decoration, not just electronics, is the differentiator here. Every case color gets a matching charm design, clearly aimed at a fashion-first buyer.

item.title: Camera-style phone case with a clip-on 0.45x super wide angle macro lens, sold alongside…
item.description: Camera-style phone case with a clip-on 0.45x super wide angle macro lens, sold alongside stacks of AirPods cases and additional lens attachments. Export-only labels on the packaging behind it point to factory overrun stock meant for overseas markets. Everything here is accessory layer, built cheap and fast around the phone rather than the phone itself.

item.title: Spotted a compact all-in-one CD player on display, cream colored body with a top-loading…
item.description: Spotted a compact all-in-one CD player on display, cream colored body with a top-loading transparent lid and physical control buttons. Sign behind it advertises integrated design with two-way bluetooth and portable operation. Retro audio format getting a modern industrial design refresh here.

item.title: Sharge's retail display shows their power bank lineup with cutaway units revealing intern…
item.description: Sharge's retail display shows their power bank lineup with cutaway units revealing internal cell and circuit layouts. Price tags on the counter list three tiers of portable chargers, from compact to high-capacity models. Transparent shell designs let shoppers see the battery construction before buying.

item.title: UBTECH's AI companion toys, fuzzy monster plushies with embedded screens for eyes, on dis…
item.description: UBTECH's AI companion toys, fuzzy monster plushies with embedded screens for eyes, on display at retail. Built-in connectivity means no wifi needed, plus long-term memory for ongoing conversations and an app for character development. Four personality types, each with matching outfits, priced under 500 yuan.

item.title: LaserPecker's dual light source fiber laser engraver on display at 14999 yuan, rated for…
item.description: LaserPecker's dual light source fiber laser engraver on display at 14999 yuan, rated for 10000mm/s engraving speed and deep engraving, relief, and metal cutting. Next to it, sample output includes an engraved photo portrait and a laser cut slate piece, showing the range from personal keepsakes to industrial materials in one desktop unit.

item.title: HOTO's SnapBloq kit on display, a modular precision tool system with color-coded magnetic…
item.description: HOTO's SnapBloq kit on display, a modular precision tool system with color-coded magnetic mounts for swappable bits. Screwdriver, rotary tool, and drill heads snap into one handle, aimed at makers and small-scale builders. Compact case design keeps the whole kit portable.

item.title: Saw the Hover Aqua up close at a retail display today. It's a floating flight camera, wat…
item.description: Saw the Hover Aqua up close at a retail display today. It's a floating flight camera, waterproof, that launches straight off the water surface with smart tracking. Priced as an accessible drone for water sports, sitting alongside other Hover models on the same shelf.

item.title: Xhorse's compact 5-axis machine tool on display at a Shenzhen hardware retailer, priced a…
item.description: Xhorse's compact 5-axis machine tool on display at a Shenzhen hardware retailer, priced around 58,000 yuan. The rounded glass enclosure and touchscreen controller show how far compact CNC machining has come for desktop and small-shop use. Marked display only, not for sale on the spot.

item.title: Saw this AI-powered plush duck at a Baby Care display today. It moves, listens, and talks…
item.description: Saw this AI-powered plush duck at a Baby Care display today. It moves, listens, and talks, with growth reports, simulated memory, Q&A, roleplay, and mood sensing all built in. Another sign that AI companions are moving fast into kids' toys here.

item.title: Riding a subway with a suitcase that doubles as a scooter. Fold out the handlebar and ste…
item.description: Riding a subway with a suitcase that doubles as a scooter. Fold out the handlebar and step platform, and it becomes a personal rider once you're off the train. Cabin size sticker suggests it still passes as carry-on luggage.

item.title: Airport corridor lined with three AI cloud ads back to back. Aliyun claims top AI cloud m…
item.description: Airport corridor lined with three AI cloud ads back to back. Aliyun claims top AI cloud market share ahead of the next three combined, a supply chain platform touts cuts in procurement cost and stockouts, and Volcano Engine claims roughly half of China's public cloud model API token usage. Striking how much ad spend is going into proving whose AI infrastructure numbers are biggest.

item.title: Found a 3D printed retractable cable spool on my desk today. USB-A on one end, USB-C on t…
item.description: Found a 3D printed retractable cable spool on my desk today. USB-A on one end, USB-C on the other, textured grip shell to keep the slack wound tight. Simple print, but it solves the tangled cable problem better than most retail products I've bought.

item.title: Bright orange charging case for wireless earbuds, hinge open on my desk. Simple molded pl…
item.description: Bright orange charging case for wireless earbuds, hinge open on my desk. Simple molded plastic shell, no branding visible. Small details like this color choice show how far cosmetic differentiation goes in China's earbud market.

item.title: Small travel router on my desk, WAN and LAN ports plus USB 3.0 out back, two fold-out ant…
item.description: Small travel router on my desk, WAN and LAN ports plus USB 3.0 out back, two fold-out antennas up top. Compact form factor built for portability, not a home router. Testing it now alongside the usual desk setup.

item.title: Compact dual-head electric shaver next to its zip travel case, both sized like a pair of…
item.description: Compact dual-head electric shaver next to its zip travel case, both sized like a pair of earbuds. Fits in a pocket, no cord in sight. Charging port likely hidden underneath, classic miniaturization play I keep seeing here.

item.title: Small action camera on my desk, front display and wide-angle lens facing out, red-ringed…
item.description: Small action camera on my desk, front display and wide-angle lens facing out, red-ringed shutter button on top. Compact protective case sits behind it, built for pocket carry. Simple setup, but the kind of rugged compact hardware I keep seeing pop up here.

item.title: Transparent shell mouse with internals fully exposed, sitting next to an Apple keyboard a…
item.description: Transparent shell mouse with internals fully exposed, sitting next to an Apple keyboard and trackpad for scale. Scroll wheel, DPI button, and battery indicator are all visible through the clear casing. Interesting look at how compact the internal layout is once you strip away the opaque shell.

item.title: Magnetic Braided USB-C cable coiled tight enough to hold its shape like a little basket o…
item.description: Magnetic Braided USB-C cable coiled tight enough to hold its shape like a little basket on the desk. Both ends terminate in USB-C, aluminum connector housings in red. Simple detail, but the braid density and self-standing coil show real attention to cable construction.

item.title: Baseus power bank on my desk, built in USB-C plug flips out from the side instead of rely…
item.description: Baseus power bank on my desk, built in USB-C plug flips out from the side instead of relying on a separate cable. Simple detail, but it cuts down on the "forgot my cord" problem. Small design call, but it is the kind of practical fix I see a lot of here.

item.title: Wireless mic kit in a compact yellow-and-black case, marked RX and TX, with transmitter,…
item.description: Wireless mic kit in a compact yellow-and-black case, marked RX and TX, with transmitter, receiver, and charging dock slots built into the foam. Sitting next to it is a small orange handheld recorder with a screen and dial. Compact audio gear keeps getting smaller and more purpose-built here.
